reviews.comment:
Lamentable servicio..mucha demora. Una sola persona atendiendo para 20 autos en espera...falta personal o los que están son inoperantes y no les interesa desempeñar sus respectivas responsabilidades

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service...very long delays. Only one person serving 20 cars waiting...either they're understaffed or the staff are incompetent and uninterested in doing their jobs.
